title: astragalus nicharensis var. longepedunulatus
intro: Astragalus nicharensis var. longepedunculatus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch or long-stemmed Astragalus, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). This herb is used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nicharensis var. longepedunculatus include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. Astragalus is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is commonly used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
